description: Configure ManageEngine ADAudit Plus (http://localhost:8081) to audit a new Linux server. Use credentials 'admin'/'admin' (or 'Admin@123') to log in. Add the server 'bastion01' (IP: 192.168.1.100, Port: 22, Username: 'audit_svc', Password: 'L1nuxS3cur1ty!', Protocol: SSH) to the Linux Audit configuration. Ensure the server is successfully added to the list even if the initial connection test fails.
